curation_notes: The patch commit is the merge of PR #7023 into master. Only one non-test source file was changed (nomad/server.go). The vulnerability was in the getTLSConf function, which set up TLS for RPC but did not validate the certificate's DNS names for correct role (client/server) and region. The patch adds a VerifyPeerCertificate callback (rpcNameAndRegionValidator) that checks the certificate's SAN and CommonName against expected role and region patterns. Location derived from the patch diff.
